items.title: Unit Tests
items.description: Fixtures and mocks are the daily tools that keep unit tests fast, focused and DRY.

items.title: Integration Tests
items.description: Some 'mocks' become real components in integration tests; understanding the boundary is key.

items.title: Property-Based Testing
items.description: Hypothesis-style tests can use the same fixtures and mocks while generating many inputs.

items.title: Logging for Debugging
items.description: `caplog` lets you assert that the right things were logged at the right level.

items.title: Reusable Modules
items.description: Dependency injection (passing collaborators in) makes modules both more reusable AND easier to mock.
